description:
GIVEN a user navigates to our Home Page, Today’s Lineup Carousel on the Home Page, or Games Page
AND a non-blacked out/entitled game without broadcasters is on the schedule (spring training)

steps.action:
WHEN a non-blacked out Live game without broadcasters is present

And the user selects the game
steps.result: THEN a "No Broadcast Available" modal is displayed with both team logos in the header.

steps.action:
When a non-blacked out Upcoming game without broadcasters is present

And the user selects the game
steps.result: Then a "You’re a bit early!" modal is displayed with both team logos in the header and a note that states: "There are no feeds available yet. Please come back later."
